channel.title: Measure Transport | Bohan Chen's Personal Webpage

item.title: Organizing ‘Measure Transport for Inverse Problems and Data Assimilation’ at SIAM MDS26
item.description:
Table of Contents
  • Overview
  • Conference Details
  • Minisymposium Schedule
  • Key Dates
  • Related Links

Overview

I am pleased to share that , , and I will be organizing a minisymposium titled

Measure Transport for Inverse Problems and Data Assimilation

at the .

The minisymposium will bring together perspectives on measure-transport methods for Bayesian inverse problems and data assimilation. These problems require us to update, approximate, and sample probability distributions after incorporating indirect or noisy observations. Transport maps, flows, and related generative techniques provide a useful common language for developing scalable computational methods for these tasks.

We look forward to conversations connecting mathematical foundations, computational algorithms, and applications across inverse problems and sequential inference.

Conference Details

  • Conference: SIAM Conference on Mathematics of Data Science (MDS26)
  • Dates: November 16–20, 2026
  • Location: Salt Palace Convention Center, Salt Lake City, Utah, U.S.
  • Format: Fully in person; remote and prerecorded presentations are not permitted
  • Conference hashtag: #SIAMMDS26

MDS26 will be held jointly with the and the .

Minisymposium Schedule

Update (July 14, 2026): SIAM has not yet posted the detailed MDS26 schedule or speaker index. The minisymposium’s session number, date, time, room, speakers, and talk titles are therefore still to be announced. SIAM states that these details will be published in July 2026 on the official . I will update this post when the session assignment becomes available.

SIAM’s standard format for a minisymposium is four 25-minute presentations, with five additional minutes for discussion after each talk. A minisymposium may have up to three parts and twelve speakers.

Key Dates

  • April 20, 2026: Minisymposium proposal submission deadline
  • May 18, 2026: Minisymposium presentation abstract submission deadline
  • July 2026: Conference schedule and speaker index expected
  • August 17, 2026: Travel support application deadline
  • October 19, 2026: Early registration and hotel reservation deadlines
  • November 16–20, 2026: SIAM MDS26 in Salt Lake City

Related Links

We hope to see many of you in Salt Lake City!
